title: Gender Types Vocabulary
description: Defines the standard and custom gender identity types for the person `gender` property (self-identified gender identity, primarily for modern/living persons)

GenderTypeDefinition.description: Definition of a single gender identity type

label.description: Human-readable label for the gender identity

description.description: Detailed description of the gender identity

gedcom.description: Optional GEDCOM value; GEDCOM has no standard tag for gender identity and defers to FACT
